title: quercus floccosa
intro: Quercus floccosa, also known as the woolly oak, is a species of oak tree native to the mountainous regions of central and western China. The medicinal properties of Quercus floccosa include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Quercus floccosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
